member.name: M:GTA.WeaponComponentCollection.GetSuppressorOrMuzzleBrakeComponent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the suppressor or muzzle brake component at the index.
member.param: The index of the subset of the suppressor and muzzle brake components of all the weapon component array.
member.returns:
A
instance if the
at the
of the subset of the suppressor and muzzle brake components is found; otherwise, the
instance representing the invalid component.
